message:
bd-1q3: add Session lazy loading methods

Add load_lazy() and load_many() for lazy relationship loading.

load_lazy(&Lazy<T>):
- Fetches single related object via Session::get()
- Caches result in Lazy wrapper
- Returns bool indicating if object was found

load_many(&[P], accessor):
- Collects all FK values from objects
- Single batch query with IN clause
- Populates all Lazy fields from lookup
- Adds loaded objects to identity map
- Prevents N+1 query problem

Both methods have tracing instrumentation for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
